nasb.text: Whoever then touches any of the things which were under him shall be unclean until evening, and he who carries them shall wash his clothes and bathe in water and be unclean until evening.

esv.text: And whoever touches anything that was under him shall be unclean until the evening. And whoever carries such things shall wash his clothes and bathe himself in water and be unclean until the evening.

cnv.text: 誰觸摸他身下任何東西，都不潔淨到晚上；拿了這些東西的，要洗淨自己的衣服，用水洗澡，並且不潔淨到晚上。

ccb.text: 凡碰到他坐过之物的人都不洁净，要等到傍晚才能洁净。碰到这些东西的人都不洁净，必须洗衣、沐浴，等到傍晚才能洁净。
